features: Enriched with Vitamin E: Powerful antioxidant properties help combat free radicals, reduce inflammation, and promote skin healing.
Hydrogel Technology: Adheres snugly to the skin, ensuring deep penetration of active ingredients for maximum efficacy.
Detoxifying Formula: Helps to cleanse and protect the skin from environmental pollutants and impurities.
Hydration Boost: Provides intense moisture, leaving your skin feeling soft, smooth, and plump
Stress Relief: Soothing ingredients help to calm and relax stressed skin, promoting a healthy, radiant look.
description: Revitalize and protect your skin with the Skin Treats Vitamin E Hydrogel Face Mask. This luxurious 60g hydrogel mask is meticulously formulated to shield your skin from harmful toxins and everyday stressors, leaving you with a refreshed, glowing complexion.
